error:
EARLY NVDEC PROBE VIOLATIONS - at least one lane script doesn't probe NVDEC at Stage 0:
  - /Users/adpena/Projects/pact/scripts/remote_lane_substrate_stack_of_stacks.sh: no `probe_nvdec.sh` call. Add Stage 0 NVDEC probe before any GPU-cost operation.
Fix: add `bash $WORKSPACE/scripts/probe_nvdec.sh || exit 2` BEFORE any train/qat/eval/archive command. Per memory feedback_vastai_nvdec_host_variation, NVDEC failure rate is ~30-50% across host pools; early-probe saves $0.05-0.10 per bad host.

steps.detail:
PreflightError: macOS RESOURCE FORK CLEANUP VIOLATIONS - at least one lane script invokes contest_auth_eval without ._* cleanup:
  - /Users/adpena/Projects/pact/scripts/remote_lane_substrate_a1_plus_wavelet_residual.sh: invokes contest_auth_eval but doesn't strip macOS AppleDouble files (._*.mkv) from upstream/videos. Add `rm -f upstream/videos/._*.mkv` BEFORE the eval call to prevent contamination-error crashes (Lane F-V2 bug 2026-04-27).
  - /Users/adpena/Projects/pact/scripts/remote_lane_substrate_stack_of_stacks.sh: invokes contest_auth_eval but doesn't strip macOS AppleDouble files (._*.mkv) from upstream/videos. Add `rm -f upstream/videos/._*.mkv` BEFORE the eval call to prevent contamination-error crashes (Lane F-V2 bug 2026-04-27).
steps.name: check_lane_scripts_strip_macos_resource_forks
